example_summary: The dearomatization of 2,6-dimethoxy-4-allylphenol with PIDA/methanol resulted in the formation of the natural product asatone in a single step. This occurs via a reactive cyclohexa-2,4-dienone intermediate which rapidly dimerizes through an intermolecular Diels-Alder cycloaddition.

extracts.notes_text: The reaction proceeds via dearomatization of the starting phenol with a hypervalent iodine reagent (PIDA) to form a reactive dienone, which then rapidly dimerizes.
